pattern: Count the independent choices for the hour digits and the minute digits separately, then multiply, since hours and minutes never constrain each other.
hints: The colon splits the string into a two-digit hour (00-23) and a two-digit minute (00-59) that are independent.
For each half, count how many digit fillings of its question marks keep the value in range.
Enumerate the at-most-100 hour candidates and at-most-100 minute candidates against the known fixed digits, then multiply the two valid counts.

edge_inputs.description: no unknowns at all yields exactly one
hour ones digit unknown with tens digit two limits to 0-3
hour tens unknown but ones is large restricts tens

stress.description: random valid clock template with question marks sprinkled in
stress.note: built from a real time then masked, so it is always a valid template
